description: Create a 4-slide summary presentation titled 'Airbnb Q3 2023 Earnings Summary' by extracting business metrics, financial results, and strategic priorities from the provided 'Q3_Earnings_Template.pptx', 'Airbnb_Q3_2023_Shareholder_Letter.docx', and 'Airbnb_Q3_2023_Financials.xlsx' located in ~/Documents. The presentation must include a slide for core operational metrics (Nights and Experiences Booked and Gross Booking Value) from the letter, a slide for financial results (Total Revenue and Net Income) from the spreadsheet, and a slide detailing the three strategic priorities identified in the shareholder letter. Save the completed presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/Airbnb_Q3_Summary.pptx.
